extra.reason: Resolved: monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Mobile imports AppRouter type directly from broccoli-api/router — no package/submodule/codegen needed.
EAS project created and linked: @afrothundr/broccoli-mobile (id ab0e4d00-4e27-42b2-ac1f-aac132506845); projectId + owner written to app.json

Built email/password sign-in flow: SignIn component (sign-in/sign-up toggle, error handling) calling authClient.signIn.email/signUp.email; root _layout gates on authClient.useSession() -> SignIn vs AppTabs; home screen shows signed-in email + sign-out. Typechecks and lint-clean. End-to-end runtime against the API is verified on-device in o8h.5 (needs the dev build).
EAS Android development build produced and installed on a physical device (build 3d145866). Includes expo-dev-client + expo-network native module.
Verified on device: app boots, home shows broccoli-api connected (/health), email/password sign-in against deployed broccoli-api succeeds, signed-in user shown.
Phase 0 complete: Expo app scaffolded, EAS set up, Android dev build on device, sign-in against broccoli-api verified end to end.
Merged in PR #11; typecheck clean. Device pass covered by vqy.5.
Merged in PR #12. Device pass covered by vqy.5.
Review screen with inline edits verified on Android emulator against production: 16 Trader Joe's items rendered with categories, editable names/prices, live total. In PR #13.
Save via receipt.confirm verified on emulator: 'Saved — 16 items from TRADER JOE'S' with SAVED row in production Postgres. In PR #13.

Core loop verified end to end on Android emulator (library-photo path) against production api+model: sign-in, upload, parse, review, save. Physical-device camera pass still worth a spot-check (emulator camera is synthetic). Three bugs found+fixed during verification: Expo useSession refetch, RN blob upload path, shared rate-limit bucket (PR #13).
Phase 1 mobile epic done: a real receipt becomes a saved, corrected item list on a device.

Verified on emulator against local api: bananas 'check it' (past estimate), green beans + blackberries 'use soon' in Use-first section; ~16d/~9d chips on perishables; shelf-stable items chip-free (>30d suppressed); expanded detail names FoodKeeper.
